messages.content: I grew up down in Victoria and moved up here after Covid. My main watering holes were The Retreat in Brunswick, Post Office in Coburg, The EC (years ago) and plenty of others.

Hey Tex,

Weâre an independently run live music pub in Newcastle. Wondering if youâd be keen to play a set or 2 following your cruel sea gig coming up at the uni. 

We had Kim Salmon drop in on his way through in December and filled the front bar easily. Also had CW Stoneking and The Boondall Boys do the same since in the last 12 months. 

Can be a solo show and keep it pretty low key, or happy for full band. Weâve also got a pretty good network of local musos who could slip in too if needed.
